reliableCore: Bulk shift duplication with settings preserved

issues.title: Shift creation hanging / silent execution failure
issues.description: Pip said 'creating now' repeatedly without executing tool calls during bulk shift creation
issues.rootCause: Execution reliability bug — investigated and resolved by Interstellar team
issues.evidence: 3 rage prompts · 84s processing delay · Jira BTD · Sprint 115 · Resolved 25 Jun 2026
issues.action: Customer notification pending — Guide Dogs NSW/ACT

issues.title: Volunteer assignment fails at end of workflow
issues.description: Pip completes shift creation and volunteer search, then fails at the assignment step
issues.rootCause: Assignment API not exposed to Pip — trust-breaking UX pattern
issues.evidence: Pip finds volunteers, cannot assign · Happened twice per session
issues.action: Expose assignment API or scope Pip out upfront

issues.title: Linked shift handling failure
issues.description: Cannot confirm linked shift updates via API
issues.rootCause: Linked shift confirmation param not exposed to Pip
issues.evidence: 9 tool call attempts · Task incomplete · User redirected to dashboard

issues.title: Unauthorized volunteer management
issues.description: System denies portal access, volunteer addition, check-in
issues.rootCause: Intentional scope boundary — volunteer portal is out of scope
issues.evidence: Pip correctly declined but users expected it to work

issues.title: Unsupported configuration requests
issues.description: Email notifications & event templates outside current scope
issues.rootCause: Capability gap — not in current scope
issues.evidence: Pip correctly declined · Users redirected externally

issues.title: Incorrect day-of-week/calendar calculation during bulk shift scheduling
issues.description: Pip miscalculated which calendar dates fall on Sat/Sun for Aug–Sep 2026, then incorrectly disputed the customer's correct date when they corrected it
issues.rootCause: Date/weekday calculation bug — distinct root cause from the AM/PM conversion issue on the same account
issues.evidence: 2 incorrect date sets generated · Pip asserted an incorrect 'correction' contradicting the customer's accurate date · No shifts created — caught pre-confirmation both times · Jira BTD · Priority 3

capabilityGaps.name: Volunteer assignment to shifts
capabilityGaps.description: API not exposed — trust-breaking failure pattern
capabilityGaps.action: Expose bulk assign API or scope out clearly upfront

capabilityGaps.roadmapItem: No matching item on the Pip! — AI Agents in Rosterfy Monday board — needs to be logged

capabilityGaps.name: Recurring / series shift creation
capabilityGaps.description: No native series support in Pip

capabilityGaps.name: Event templates & email notifications
capabilityGaps.roadmapItem: Pip Event Templates & Email Notifications — Monday.com

capabilityGaps.name: Applications close date/time — bulk API access
capabilityGaps.description: Close date/time can only be updated one shift at a time; no bulk or scheduled update via API
capabilityGaps.action: Confirmed small effort by engineering — expose close date/time field via API. Recurring need: Achilles closes applications ~24h before each shift (Tue shifts close Mon night, Fri shifts close Sat morning)
capabilityGaps.roadmapItem: Not yet logged on Monday — recommend adding as a sub-item under Pip! — AI Agents in Rosterfy

capabilityGaps.name: Lite admin permission toggle (on/off)
capabilityGaps.description: Ability to enable or disable lite admin access per account — demand direction varies by customer
capabilityGaps.action: Demand still being validated — some accounts want lite admins enabled, others want it turned off. Confirm scope before committing to a build
capabilityGaps.roadmapItem: Not yet logged on Monday — pending demand validation
